overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban plaza. The player character walks past holographic billboards and reflective wet pavement, ascends stairs to an upper plaza level, observes two NPCs playing basketball on a neon-lit court, and approaches a building entrance with large holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground level urban plaza with neon signage and trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the wet plaza, observing the neon-lit buildings and digital advertisements

entered.detail: Futuristic skyscraper with vertical neon lighting and glass facade
Large illuminated advertisement screen displaying pink and red graphics
Deciduous tree with uplighting illuminating the trunk and canopy
Standalone digital advertising display with glowing screen
Wet tiled ground reflecting the neon lights from surrounding buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a ground-level urban plaza at night, surrounded by towering glass buildings adorned with neon lights and digital billboards. The wet pavement creates mirror-like reflections of the cyan and pink neon glow. Sparse pedestrians walk through the plaza as the camera moves forward past trees and digital kiosks.

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs to upper plaza level

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete stairs while turning slightly left, moving between plaza levels

entered.detail: Wide concrete staircase with multiple steps leading upward
Building facade illuminated with distinctive purple vertical neon strips
Tall cylindrical light fixture emitting white light

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the open plaza to a concrete staircase, ascending to an upper level. The environment becomes more enclosed between buildings, with a distinctive purple-lit building facade visible to the left. Vertical light pillars mark the stairway as the camera climbs steadily upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper plaza walkway with neon accent lighting

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters upper plaza level with different lighting layout

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper plaza past benches and illuminated planters, heading toward the basketball court area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the opposite direction past the camera

entered.detail: Elevated pedestrian area with patterned pavement and embedded lighting
Cyan neon light strips embedded in the ground marking pathways
Contemporary concrete and metal bench with clean lines
Palm tree with uplighting in a concrete planter
Suspended digital advertising screens spanning across the plaza

segments.scene_description: Having ascended the stairs, the camera enters an upper plaza level characterized by cyan neon floor strips and modern benches. Decorative palm trees and illuminated planters line the walkway while overhead digital billboards display advertisements. The area is sparsely populated with a few pedestrians walking in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor basketball court with neon court markings

events.description: enters basketball court area with distinct court lines and hoop

agents.ego_description: walking around the perimeter of the basketball court while observing the game in progress

notable_agents.action: player shooting basketball toward the hoop while being defended
defender attempting to block the basketball shot

entered.detail: Dark asphalt court surface with reflective wet patches
Standard basketball hoop with backboard and pole
Glowing cyan lines marking the basketball court boundaries and key areas
Tall building featuring a massive holographic advertisement of a woman's face

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a distinctive basketball court illuminated by neon cyan court lines embedded in the dark asphalt surface. Two game characters are actively playing basketball—one shooting while the other defends. The court is surrounded by towering buildings including one with a massive holographic face advertisement. The camera circles around the court perimeter, capturing the game from multiple angles.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance corridor with holographic displays

events.description: exits basketball court and enters corridor leading to building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking toward the building entrance between tall structures, passing vending machines and benches

entered.detail: Glass and metal entrance to the building with illuminated interior
Massive floating holographic display showing animated content
Line of illuminated vending machines with glowing product displays
Minimalist concrete seating along the walkway

segments.scene_description: Leaving the basketball court behind, the camera moves through a narrower corridor between buildings toward a glass entrance. Large holographic advertisements float beside the path, while a row of illuminated vending machines lines the left side. The environment shifts from the open court to a more enclosed approach to the building entrance, with concrete benches providing seating along the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit futuristic city, moving from a wide ground-level plaza up into an enclosed upper-tier urban complex. It begins by gliding across wet, reflective pavement beneath towering glass buildings and cyan-pink digital billboards, moving past sparse pedestrians and kiosks. As the camera reaches a concrete staircase, the environment tightens between buildings, ascending past vertical light pillars and a purple-lit facade toward an elevated walkway lined with neon floor strips and decorative palm trees. The scene then opens into a dark asphalt basketball court where two characters play amidst glowing cyan lines and a massive holographic face, with the camera circling the perimeter to capture the action. Finally, the view shifts away from the court into a narrower corridor, passing illuminated vending machines and floating holograms before arriving at a glass building entrance.
